label_sr: Локална модерност и симболичка власт у југоисточној Европи
label_en: Local modernity and symbolic power in Southeast Europe
description_en: Historiographical framework that interprets processes of modernity through local case studies, emphasizing the role of symbolic power, cultural practices, and political legitimacy in shaping social transformation in Southeast Europe.
notes: Main framework item; listed as related item inside cluster lists in supplied data.

label_sr: Чачак као студија случаја локалне модерности у југоисточној Европи
label_en: Čačak as a case study of local modernity in Southeast Europe
description_en: historiographical concept using the town of Čačak as a case study for analyzing processes of local modernity, urban transformation, cultural practices, and political symbolism in Southeast Europe during the 19th and 20th centuries.
notes: Research cluster item; child of the main framework.
